# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies:
  - name: common
    repository: "https://charts.example.com"

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-{{ .Values.service.name }}
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-{{ .Values.service.name }}
    spec:
      replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}-{{ .Values.service.name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}-{{ .Values.service.name }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Values.service.name }}
              image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
              ports:
                - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
              resources:
                requests:
                  cpu: {{ .Values.resources.requests.cpu }}
                  memory: {{ .Values.resources.requests.memory }}
                limits:
                  cpu: {{ .Values.resources.limits.cpu }}
                  memory: {{ .Values.resources.limits.memory }}
              env:
                - name: ENV_VAR
                  value: {{ .Values.env.ENV_VAR }}
              securityContext:
                allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
                readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
                runAsUser: 1000
                runAsGroup: 3000
                capabilities:
                  drop:
                    - ALL

values.yaml:
  replicaCount: 2
  image:
    repository: myrepo/myservice
    tag: latest
  service:
    name: myservice
    port: 8080
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: "100m"
      memory: "128Mi"
    limits:
      cpu: "500m"
      memory: "256Mi"
  env:
    ENV_VAR: "value"
